items.title: Microsoft’s Xbox reset is pivoting Obsidian to make Fallout instead of Avowed
items.description: As part of Microsoft's big Xbox "reset," which includes layoffs affecting 3,200 staffers, jettisoning studios, and shifting investments to focus on "higher priority projects," Obsidian Entertainment is changing its plans. items.title: ChatGPT’s upgraded voice mode is better at shutting up
items.description: OpenAI is overhauling ChatGPT's voice mode with a new model that it says is more like "talking to another person." The new GPT-Live-1 is designed to interrupt you less and will also wait for you to continue speaking if you pause mid-conversation. During a press briefing, OpenAI research lead Kundan ...
